name: Home Assistant
description: Control your Home Assistant smart home: list entities, check states, call services (lights, switches, climate, media, scenes, etc.), and speak text on voice devices / speakers with automatic routing (assist_satellite.announce preferred, tts.speak fallback). Requires a publicly reachable HA instance (Nabu Casa, Cloudflare Tunnel, DuckDNS, or Tailscale).

credentials_required.label: Home Assistant URL
credentials_required.hint: Public URL of your HA instance (e.g. https://abc123.ui.nabu.casa or https://ha.my-domain.com). No trailing /api.

credentials_required.label: Long-Lived Access Token
credentials_required.hint: Create in HA: Profile icon -> Security tab -> 'Create Token' at the bottom. Keep this secret — it grants full control of your HA instance.

tools.name: list_entities
tools.description: List all entities, optionally filtered by domain (light, switch, sensor, climate, etc.)

tools.name: get_state
tools.description: Get the current state and attributes of a specific entity

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: List available services, optionally filtered by domain

tools.name: call_service
tools.description: Call a service (e.g. light.turn_on, switch.toggle, climate.set_temperature)

tools.name: speak
tools.description: Speak text on a voice device / speaker. Auto-selects assist_satellite.announce (HA Voice) or tts.speak with media_player, with optional device_hint to pick a specific room

author: freddy-schuetz
